title: pelargonium cycloides
intro: Pelargonium cycloides, a member of the Geraniaceae family, is a plant species native to South Africa, also known as the "round-leaved geranium" due to its distinctive rounded leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium cycloides include its potential to alleviate symptoms of the common cold, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
